description: Temporal queries (e.g., containing '2026', a specific month) sometimes retrieve and rank outdated content (from 2025) higher than current content.
suggested_fix: Extract publication dates from pages and apply a recency-decay signal that strongly boosts content matching the queried year/month.

description: Official domains (.gov, .edu, organization-specific) are frequently outranked by news aggregators, forums, and social media for factual and data extraction intents, even when the query explicitly names the source.
suggested_fix: Include domain-authority embeddings and fine-tune the ranking loss to penalize low-authority results when the user intent is factual or data-driven.

description: Data tables rendered via JavaScript are systematically missed, leading to missing structured content and degraded scores.
suggested_fix: Train a classifier to predict when a page contains JavaScript‑dependent tables; for such pages, automatically invoke a headless browser rendering step before extraction.
